data.title: Resident Evil Requiem
data.description: Requiem for the dead. Nightmare for the living. Prepare to escape death in a heart-stopping experience that will chill you to your core.

data.title: Death Stranding 2: On the Beach
data.description: Embark on an inspiring mission of human connection beyond the UCA. Sam and his companions set out on another journey to save humanity from extinction. Join them as they traverse a world beset by otherworldly enemies and new obstacles.

data.title: Forza Horizon 6
data.description: Discover the breathtaking landscapes of Japan in over 550 real-world cars and become a racing Legend in Forza Horizon's biggest open world driving adventure yet.

data.title: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight
data.description: Rise as the Dark Knight and experience the essential Batman story in a bold, action-packed adventure with hard-hitting combat, an open-world Gotham City, and the signature LEGO charm that fans know and love.

data.title: Arknights: Endfield
data.description: Arknights: Endfield is an open-world anime-inspired cross-platform action Role-Playing Game. The RPG features large open worlds, sci-fi themed Anime aesthetics, fast action combat, interactable environments, PvE systems, and much more.
